kael_intro.title: Custodian Kael
kael_intro.text: I am Unit 01... Keeper of the Gate to the upper Spire.

kael_intro.title: Custodian Kael
kael_intro.text: My gears are seized. I need a Rusty Gear to repair my intake valve. Please...

kael_intro.title: Custodian Kael
kael_intro.text: You... found it... Proceeding with repair sequence.

kael_intro.title: Custodian Kael
kael_intro.text: Systems online. The gate is open. Take this Archive Key.

kael_intro.title: Custodian Kael
kael_intro.text: Go forth, Echo. The Silence waits above.

f1_stairs_check.title: Locked Gate
f1_stairs_check.text: The gate is sealed. A nearby construct seems to be the key.

f5_stairs_check.title: Blocked Way
f5_stairs_check.text: The Crimson Lord guards this path. Defeat him to proceed.

f6_stairs_check.title: Security Barrier
f6_stairs_check.text: Access Denied. Authorization required. (Requires Archive Key)

f10_stairs_check.title: Locked
f10_stairs_check.text: The Architect controls this gate. Confront him.

architect_encounter.title: Grand Architect
architect_encounter.text: Inefficiency detected. Organic memories consume excessive storage.

f5_boss_encounter.title: The Crimson Gate
f5_boss_encounter.text: A towering figure in red armor blocks the stairs. It radiates a thirst that dries your throat.

f5_boss_encounter.title: Crimson Lord
f5_boss_encounter.text: More blood for the Spire. Come, little droplets.

f14_boss_encounter.title: Near Zenith
f14_boss_encounter.text: The air crackles with void energy. The Entropy Lord manifests.

echo_log_1.title: Faint Echo
echo_log_1.text: Log 001: The Silence has taken the lower valleys. We are sealing the Archive today.

echo_log_2.title: Faint Echo
echo_log_2.text: Log 404: The Keepers are acting strange. They've started 'optimizing' the refugees.

echo_log_3.title: Faint Echo
echo_log_3.text: Log 999: There is no saving the world. Only remembering it. Kael was right.

zenith_choice.title: The Spire Core
zenith_choice.text: You reach the Zenith. The Resonance Engines hum with the stored memories of the world.

zenith_choice.title: The Spire Core
zenith_choice.text: The Silence is not an enemy. It is the end of the cycle. The Spire was built to save the SEED of the next world, not this one.

script.text: You activate the Archive Protocol. The world fades into white silence, safely stored for the next eon.
You smash the engines. The stored memories flood back into reality, pushing back the Silence violently.
